label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out the best title for this passage. So the question is asking which option (A-D) is the best title. First, I need to understand the main idea of the passage. The passage is about Will Steger, a polar explorer and environmentalist, leading a team on a dogsled trip across the Canadian Arctic to show the effects of global warming. The trip is meant to bring attention to global warming by sharing videos, stories, and photos online so people can follow along. The key points here are global warming, the Arctic, and Steger's expedition to highlight its effects. Looking at the options: (A) The Arctic Is In Danger This seems to focus on the Arctic facing threats. While the passage does mention global warming affecting the Arctic, the main purpose is to show the effects through the expedition, not just stating the Arctic is in danger. (B) Discoveries of the Arctic This suggests new findings or explorations. The passage isn't about new discoveries but rather about demonstrating the impacts of global warming. (C) Sledding Through the Arctic This refers to the method of travel (dogsled) but the main point is not just the journey itself, but using it to highlight global warming. (D) Consequences of Global Warming This directly addresses the main theme of the passage. The expedition's purpose is to show the effects (consequences) of global warming in the Arctic, which aligns with Steger's mission as an environmentalist. So, the correct answer is (D) Consequences of Global Warming. The passage is about using the expedition to demonstrate the effects
